name: /audit-pack --tui flag invokes the interactive visualization view
command: mkdir -p compliance && : > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --tui --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'view=tui' out.txt && grep -q 'interactive=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
